name: Parade of the Dead

abilities.name: Treading on Graves
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to move up to 4". If it does, after moving, it may remove a Remains marker within 1" to draw a card.

abilities.name: Left Out of the Parade
abilities.text: When this model receives a raise while attacking, the target gains an Abandoned token.

abilities.name: Walk with Pride
abilities.text: After this model declares a non-Charge general action, it may drain a (+) to have another ally within 3" declare the same action.

extraction_notes: The card shows 'Abandoned' as a token type granted by the Left Out of the Parade ability, but no definition is provided on this card.
